chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 84 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 16.02.2024 Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicant submits that there are counter cases between the parties, but one case (Sessions Case No.467/2021 titled The State versus Muhammad Talib and others) is pending before learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze, whereas, the counter case (Sessions Case No.626/2021 titled The State versus Ameer Hussain and others) is pending before learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze, and requests that either of the case may be transferred to any of the Courts to avoid conflicting judgments. Learned Additional Prosecutor General has recorded no objection. Accordingly, Sessions Case No.626/2021 (Re: The State versus Ameer Hussain and others is withdrawn from the file of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze and is transferred to learned 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze for disposal in accordance with law. Application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
